Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class WebCart

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.WebCart
public class WebCart extends SObject

Java class for WebCart complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="WebCart">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Account" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AccountId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingAddress" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}address" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingCity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingCountry" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingGeocodeAccuracy" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingLatitude" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingLongitude" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingPostalCode" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingState" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BillingStreet" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CartDeliveryGroups" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CartItemPriceAdjustments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CartItemTaxes" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CartItems" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GrandTotalAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GuestEmailAddress" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GuestFirstName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GuestLastName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GuestPhoneNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GuestSecondName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Histories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InventoryReservationIdentifier" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeleted" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsRepricingNeeded" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsSecondary" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastRepricingDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OrderOwner" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OrderOwnerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Owner" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OwnerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentGroup" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}PaymentGroup" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentGroupId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentMethod" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PaymentMethodId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PoNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessExceptions" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessInstances" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProcessSteps" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Shares" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TaxType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalAdjustmentAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalAmountAfterAllAdjustments" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalChargeAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalChargeTaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalLineItemsWithErrors" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalListAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalProductAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalProductCount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalProductTaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalPromoAdjustmentAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalPromoAdjustmentTaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TotalTaxAmount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UniqueProductCount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRecordAccess" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRecordAccess" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WebCart" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WebCartAdjustmentBases" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WebCartAdjustmentGroups" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WebStore" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}WebStore" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="WebStoreId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
